topic: Continue.dev Alternatives 2026: 6 Open-Source VS Code AI Plugins Compared

key_points: Reviews 10 alternatives including Cursor AI, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, Cline AI
Positions Cline AI as the most direct open-source competitor to Continue.dev
Includes pricing comparison table: Continue.dev free (BYOK), Cline free (BYOK), Cursor $20/mo
Highlights Continue.dev limitations: less mature agent mode, no built-in models, requires API key
Published April 2026 — current and relevant
Complete 2026 guide comparing 8 open-source AI coding assistants with GitHub star counts
Table: Cline 58.8k stars, OpenCode 95k+, Aider 41.8k, Continue.dev 31.8k, Tabby 32.2k, Goose 32.7k, Roo Code 22.6k, Kilo Code 1.5M users
Decision guide by use case: Cline for VS Code power users, Continue.dev for VS Code + JetBrains, Tabby for self-hosted
Published March 10, 2026
Cline has 62.5k GitHub stars and 6.6k forks as of May 2026
Autonomous coding agent SDK for VS Code
Supports Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama (local models)
Features: browser control, terminal execution, MCP integration, file system access
Apache 2.0 licensed, BYOK model
Tabby VS Code extension has 78,192 installs on VS Code Marketplace
Self-hosted AI coding assistant — runs your own server on-premises
Real-time multi-line code suggestions and full function completion
Works with VS Code, JetBrains, Vim, Emacs
Apache 2.0 license, 32.2k GitHub stars
Roo Code was ARCHIVED on May 15, 2026 — extension shut down
Had 24.2k GitHub stars and 3.3k forks at shutdown
Community fork 'ZooCode' started by Roo Code community members
Was a VS Code extension with multi-agent dev team features
Significant news: one of the most popular AI VS Code plugins discontinued
Void has 28.8k GitHub stars and 2.5k forks
Open-source Cursor alternative — full VS Code fork (Apache 2.0)
Paused active development in early 2026 to explore novel coding ideas
Features: AI agents on codebase, checkpoint/visualize changes, bring any model
Sends messages directly to AI providers without retaining user data

stats.fact: VS Code is used by 75.9% of developers (2025 Stack Overflow survey), with 50 million monthly active users
Cline has 62.5k GitHub stars as of May 2026, making it the most starred VS Code AI coding extension
Continue.dev has 31.8k GitHub stars and is Apache 2.0 licensed with VS Code + JetBrains support
Tabby VS Code extension has 78,192 installs on VS Code Marketplace and 32.2k GitHub stars
Roo Code was archived on May 15, 2026 with 24.2k GitHub stars — one of the biggest open-source AI plugin shutdowns
Kilo Code claims 1.5M users with Apache 2.0 license, supporting VS Code + JetBrains + CLI and 500+ models
OpenCode has 95k+ GitHub stars (MIT license), fastest-growing open-source AI coding tool as of mid-2026
Void editor has 28.8k GitHub stars but paused development in Jan 2026 to explore new coding paradigms
Cline supports BYOK with 100+ AI providers including Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and local models via Ollama
